description: macOS menu bar app for managing Claude Code tasks. Persistent task visibility, session-linked execution, and one-click resume.
rules: This is a Tauri v2 desktop app with React 19 frontend and Rust backend
Task data is stored as JSON files in ~/.claude/tasks/<list-name>/<id>.json
The app watches the task directory for real-time sync
Tasks are linked to Claude Code sessions via metadata.session_id
Supports iTerm2, Terminal.app, and Warp for session spawning
